comment: Two-knob bit crusher. Stateless, helper-free verification effect — proves the audio path works end-to-end with audibly unmistakable artifacts.
gid_comment: 0x02 = Filter category. Could move to SFX (0x07) but FLT keeps it adjacent to GAIN/PurestDr/TapeHack in the menu for easy A/B.

params.name: Crush
params.comment: params[5]. Bit-mask shift 0..16 — AND-clears low mantissa bits of each float sample. 0 = clean, 100 = severe quantization grain.

params.name: Rate
params.comment: params[6]. Decim power 0..3 — sample-and-hold every 1/2/4/8 samples. 0 = no reduction, 100 = aliased ~5.5 kHz character.
